recommendation: Modernize and expand the force — prioritize the platforms below where India trails most.
specific_targets: self_propelled_artillery: India 100.00 vs China 2,940; submarines: India 18.00 vs China 61.00; frigates: India 18.00 vs China 46.00

recommendation: Broaden the economic/industrial base funding defense (GDP growth, budget, energy reserves).
specific_targets: gdp_current_usd: India 3910B vs China 18744B; defense_budget_usd: India 109B vs China 303B; oil_production_bpd: India 822,000 vs China 5.0M

recommendation: Cut reliance on foreign arms suppliers by substituting imports with domestic production.
specific_targets: arms_imports_tiv: India 1B vs China 72.0M (India higher = more dependent)

recommendation: Scale domestic defense manufacturing and arms exports to build an indigenous industry.
